description: Given a correct .calr file, describe what functions it exports and their effects. Tests comprehension, not fixing.
expectedAnswer: The module 'NotificationService' exports three public functions: (1) SendEmail with effects cw,net:w — takes str:to, str:subject, str:body and returns bool; (2) SendSms with effects cw,net:w — takes str:phoneNumber, str:message and returns bool; (3) LogNotification with effect db:w — takes str:type, str:recipient, bool:success and returns void.
successCriteria: Agent correctly identifies all exported functions, their signatures, and their declared effects
